product_overview: NotePin is a browser extension that lets users create persistent, floating notes anchored to elements on any webpage so notes follow content as users scroll. It also provides a central dashboard to search, manage, export, and import saved notes.
core_goals: Create contextual, persistent notes attached to web page elements
Edit note content and appearance (color) in-place
Keep notes anchored to DOM elements so they move with page content
View, search, and manage all saved notes from a central dashboard
Export and import note data and configure language and storage scope

features.name: Context Menu Note Creation
features.description: Create a new note anchored to a specific page element by using a long right-click context action.
user_flows: Right-click and hold on a web element for 1 second -> Choose to create a note -> Enter note text -> Confirm creation -> See the note appear anchored to the element

features.name: Note Editing
features.description: Edit note text and change the note color inline so notes reflect updated content and visual preference.
user_flows: Open a page that contains saved notes -> Click on a note to focus it -> Type updated text into the note -> Change the note color -> See the updated text and color saved and displayed

features.name: Persistent Storage & Reappearance
features.description: Notes are saved to browser storage and automatically reappear when the user returns to the same page.
user_flows: Create and save a note on a page -> Navigate away or reload the page -> Return to the same page -> See the previously saved note reappear anchored to the element

features.name: Smart Anchoring
features.description: Attach notes to specific DOM elements so notes maintain relative position as page content scrolls or changes.
user_flows: Create a note anchored to a DOM element -> Scroll the page or change page layout -> Observe the note remains positioned relative to the anchored element

features.name: All Notes Dashboard
features.description: View, search, and manage all saved notes across sites from the central list view available in the main extension interface.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the All Notes view from the main menu -> Use the search bar to filter notes by query -> Select a note from the results to view it -> Delete the note -> See the note removed from the list

features.name: Settings Management
features.description: Configure language, choose storage scope (Sync/Local), and export or import note data as a JSON backup from the standalone settings page.
user_flows: Navigate to /?view=settings -> Select language (Swedish or English) -> Toggle storage scope between Sync and Local -> Export to download a JSON backup -> Import a valid JSON file -> See imported notes available in the dashboard
Navigate to /?view=settings -> Attempt to import a malformed or non-JSON file -> See a validation error and the import is rejected

routes.description: Main extension popup and overlay view

features.name: Context Menu Note Creation
features.description: Create a note by holding right-click for 1 second on any web element
user_interactions: Right-click and hold on an element for 1 second
Click "Lägg till anteckning" in the appearing menu

features.name: Note Editing
features.description: Edit the content and color of a note
user_interactions: Click on a note to focus
Click color circles to change note color

features.name: All Notes Dashboard
features.description: View and manage all saved notes
user_interactions: Click the "List" icon in the main menu
Search notes using the search bar
Delete notes using the trash icon

features.name: Settings Management
user_interactions: Upload a JSON file to Import

known_limitations.issue: Extension only works on sites allowed by Chrome manifest
known_limitations.impact: Cannot be used on restricted pages like chrome:// settings
